title: LLM providers
intro: Connect any OpenAI-compatible endpoint that is reachable from this browser. Providers are shared across every playground in this browser. Localhost servers (Ollama, LM Studio) require running the app locally (npm run dev). API keys are stored on this device — never use unrestricted production keys.
noProvidersYet: No providers yet. Add one to get started.
chooseProvider: Choose a provider from the list or add a new one.
deleteConfirmMessage: Delete provider "{{name}}"? Agents using it will be unassigned.
modelsFound_one: {{count, number}} model found — choose which to add.
modelsFound_other: {{count, number}} models found — choose which to add.
connectedNoModels: Connected in {{ms, number}}ms, but the server listed no models.
rememberHintLocal: Persists in local storage until cleared. Not a secure vault.
rememberHintSession: Off: the key is cleared when this tab closes.
pathHint: Leave the path at the default unless your host uses a custom route.
enterValidUrlFirst: Enter a valid base URL first
noModelsYet: No models yet. Fetch them from your provider or add a model ID below.
testHint: Sends a minimal chat completion to verify the endpoint, key, and response format.
